Doubao vs Grok

Compare Doubao and Grok: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Doubao

ByteDance's AI assistant. Basic features are free, but recent controversy over charging has eroded user trust. Free tier still includes AI image generation.

Pros

  • ✓ByteDance ecosystem
  • ✓Multimodal
  • ✓Fast response

Cons

  • ✗Average creativity
  • ✗Complex tasks not as good
  • ✗Started charging May 2026

Key Features

Doubao model poweredMulti-turn chatImage understandingCode generationDocument summarySearch enhancedFree to use
View Details →

Grok

xAI's (Elon Musk) large language model. Grok 4.2/4.3 went viral on Bilibili. Free to use with no restrictions on mobile and PC. After removing limits, the experience rivals paid alternatives.

Pros

  • ✓Completely free to use
  • ✓Strong Chinese language ability
  • ✓Works on mobile and PC
  • ✓High popularity with active community

Cons

  • ✗May need workarounds to remove restrictions
  • ✗May need VPN for access in China

Key Features

Chat Q&ACode generationImage understandingReal-time web access
View Details →
